chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Ruling of Forcing a Man to Provide for His Relatives

text: 3424 - رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ اَلْحَلَبِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : قُلْتُ لَهُ مَنِ اَلَّذِي أُجْبَرُ عَلَى نَفَقَتِهِ قَالَ "اَلْوَالِدَانِ وَ اَلْوَلَدُ وَ اَلزَّوْجَةُ وَ اَلْوَارِثُ اَلصَّغِيرُ يَعْنِي اَلْأَخَ وَ اِبْنَ اَلْأَخِ وَ غَيْرَهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3424 - Muhammad ibn Ali al-Halabi narrated from Abu Abdillah (as):
I said to Imam (as): "Who are those whom I am obligated to provide for?"
Imam (as) said: "The parents, the child, the wife, and the minor heir - meaning the brother, the brother's son, and others."
